heroHeadline: WSJ: Trump 'Seriously Discussing' NATO Exit; Sikorski Expresses Article 5 Doubt — Rutte Flies to Washington
heroSubtitle: The Wall Street Journal reports Trump is 'seriously discussing' NATO withdrawal with aides while The Economist describes a 'funeral mood' in European capitals. Polish FM Sikorski said only 'we certainly hope' Article 5 would defend Poland — the sharpest allied doubt in alliance history. A UK-led 40-nation Hormuz coalition convened without the US on April 2. NATO SG Rutte flies to Washington April 8 for a make-or-break meeting with Trump, Rubio, and Hegseth.
footerNote: Data sourced from NATO HQ, White House, US Department of Defense, Reuters, Bloomberg, Wall Street Journal, The Economist, The Telegraph, TIME, Politico, German Federal Foreign Office, Axios, NPR, Washington Post, Al Jazeera, EU News, Swedish MFA
